java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • weakerPositiveVariations

      public void weakerPositiveVariations()
      Unit tests for Variations.getWeakerPositive(Predicate). The first predicate implies all the others.

    • strongerPositiveVariations

      public void strongerPositiveVariations()
      Unit tests for Variations.getWeakerPositive(Predicate). The first predicate is implied by each of the others.

    • weakerNegativeVariations

      public void weakerNegativeVariations()
      Unit tests for Variations.getWeakerNegative(Predicate). The negation of the first predicate implies all the others.

    • strongerNegativeVariations

      public void strongerNegativeVariations()
      Unit tests for Variations.getStrongerNegative(Predicate). The negation of the first predicate is implied by each of the others.

    • equivalentVariations

      public void equivalentVariations()
      Unit tests for Variations.getEquivalent(Predicate).The first predicate is equivalent to each of the others.
